title: Add AI Image Studio to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [AI Image Studio](https://home.liukun.com/Projects/ImgStudio/) to image
- AI Image Studio is a full-pipeline AI image generation and refinement workbench powered by Pollinations.ai. It integrates the Pollinations REST API as the primary text-to-image engine, featuring autom

Fixes #9953

gist.headline: Welcome to the Studio
gist.blurb: A brand new full-pipeline AI image generation workbench just landed in the Greenhouse. Powered by our REST API, AI Image Studio gives you a complete toolkit for crafting and refining your pixels.
gist.summary: Added AI Image Studio, a full-pipeline AI image generation and refinement workbench powered by the Pollinations REST API, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use AI Image Studio from our apps directory to generate and refine images using a dedicated workbench UI.
gist.visual_concept: An artist's studio or digital workbench. Polly the bee acting as a digital artist, working at a retro computer or drafting table, generating images.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, working at a retro digital drafting table in a sunlit studio. Glowing lime green (#ecf874) screens show beautiful pixel landscapes being generated. Soft pastel gradient background with warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Chunky sprites, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, working at a retro digital drafting table in a sunlit studio. Glowing lime green (#ecf874) screens show beautiful pixel landscapes being generated. Soft pastel gradient background with warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
